address.full: 22 Whitehall Rd, Small Heath, Birmingham B9 5EJ, United Kingdom

seo.homepageTitle: Home Removals Birmingham | The Royals Removals
seo.homepageDescription: Professional home removals in Birmingham. The Royals Removals offers careful, insured house moves across Birmingham and the West Midlands. Get your free quote today.

testimonials.author: Sarah J.
testimonials.text: Absolutely outstanding service from start to finish. The team were professional, careful, and made moving day completely stress-free. Would 100% recommend The Royals Removals to anyone.

testimonials.author: Michael K.
testimonials.text: Got my quote within 10 minutes of filling in the form. The price was fair and transparent — no surprises on the day. Brilliant team, brilliant service.

testimonials.author: Lisa T.
testimonials.text: We used The Royals Removals for our office relocation. Seamless, efficient, and incredibly professional. Everything was set up exactly as we asked. Highly recommended.

testimonials.author: Daniel O.
testimonials.text: Cannot fault these guys at all. They arrived on time, were polite throughout, and treated every item like it was their own. My new house was miles away and everything arrived in perfect condition. First class.

testimonials.author: Priya S.
testimonials.text: I was really nervous about moving as I had a lot of fragile antiques. The Royals Removals wrapped and packed everything with such care. Not a single thing was damaged. I'm so relieved and grateful — highly recommend.

testimonials.author: James W.
testimonials.text: Used them for a last-minute move after another company let me down. They squeezed us in the very next day, were fast and efficient, and actually came in under the quoted price. Exceptional — these are now my go-to movers.

testimonials.author: Amara B.
testimonials.text: Moving out of Birmingham to Wolverhampton felt daunting but The Royals Removals made it so easy. The lads were friendly, hardworking, and got everything done well ahead of schedule. Would use again without hesitation.

testimonials.author: Sufyaan Hussain
testimonials.text: Excellent Service – Highly Recommended! The Royals Removals provided an outstanding service from start to finish. The team was punctual, professional, and handled all our furniture with great care. Everything arrived safely and on time. Very friendly and stress-free experience. I highly recommend The Royals Removals to anyone looking for a reliable moving company.

testimonials.author: Danyal Ch.
testimonials.text: Very efficient and well-organised team. They arrived on time, packed and loaded everything quickly, and delivered without any damage. Very happy with the service.

testimonials.author: Nickean Sewell
testimonials.text: They were absolutely brilliant — amazing service.

testimonials.author: Adam Jarvis
testimonials.text: Really nice guys, did the job with care. Would recommend and look to book again.

homeFaqs.question: How quickly will I receive my quote?
homeFaqs.answer: You will typically receive your personalised quote within 10 to 15 minutes. Our team is available 7 days a week and reviews every request personally — no automated responses.

homeFaqs.question: Are you insured for damage?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes, we are fully insured with comprehensive goods-in-transit cover. Your belongings are protected throughout the entire move. We also use professional wrapping and padding to prevent damage in the first place.

homeFaqs.question: Do you offer packing services?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes. We offer both full and partial professional packing services. Our trained packers will carefully wrap and box all of your belongings using high-quality materials. We can pack your entire property or focus on fragile and valuable items only.

homeFaqs.question: Can I move on a weekend or bank holiday?
homeFaqs.answer: Absolutely. We operate 7 days a week including weekends and most bank holidays. We understand that moving often needs to happen on specific days, and we are happy to accommodate your preferred schedule.

homeFaqs.question: How far in advance should I book?
homeFaqs.answer: We recommend booking at least 2 to 4 weeks in advance, particularly during peak periods such as summer and the end of the month. However, we do accommodate short-notice and last-minute moves whenever our schedule allows.

homeFaqs.question: Do you cover areas outside Birmingham?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes. While we are based in Birmingham, we serve the entire West Midlands region including Solihull, Sutton Coldfield, Coventry, Wolverhampton, Walsall, Dudley, Sandwell, and many surrounding areas. Contact us to confirm we cover your location.

homeFaqs.question: How do you handle parking and Clean Air Zone (CAZ) charges?
homeFaqs.answer: As local Birmingham movers, we handle all the logistics. We can help guide you on arranging parking dispensations with the City Council if needed, and our modern vehicle fleet meets Clean Air Zone requirements, so you won't face unexpected CAZ charges.

homeFaqs.question: Do you dismantle and reassemble furniture?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes, our team is fully equipped to dismantle and reassemble beds, wardrobes, and other large furniture items. Simply let us know what you need during your quote process so we can allocate the right amount of time for your move.
